test.template:
Run the full test suite with coverage:
```bash
uv run pytest
```
Analyze any failures and suggest fixes.

lint.template:
Run ruff lint check:
```bash
uv run ruff check src/
```
Report all lint violations found.

format.template:
Run ruff formatter in check mode (dry-run):
```bash
uv run ruff format --check src/
```
Report any formatting issues found.

typecheck.template:
Run mypy type checking:
```bash
uv run mypy src/
```
Report all type errors found.

check.template:
Run the full CI check suite:
```bash
uv run ruff check src/ && uv run ruff format --check src/ && uv run mypy src/
```
Report all issues found across lint, format, and type checks.
check.description: Run full CI checks (lint + format + typecheck)
